what_it_does: Records a channel attachment metadata entry that links attachment att-4561af2c to board item item-c9c78735 in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: The file consists entirely of YAML frontmatter with no body content.
It declares an attachment_type of board_items and a target URI board://item-c9c78735.
standouts: The target uses a board:// URI scheme pointing to item-c9c78735.
The attachment_type board_items signals a board-item linkage record.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a stable id field.
Stores a channel-qualified attachment in a channel_attachments directory.
References an external target via a URI-style board:// identifier.
concerns: No body content or description beyond the frontmatter fields.
The semantics of board:// and attachment_type are not defined inside this file.
notes: A minimal channel-attachment ledger stub that points a board item to a specific attachment id.
questions: What operations are valid for a board_items attachment?
Is the target board://item-c9c78735 expected to resolve within the same project or across projects?
Are there other attachment_type values and where are they enumerated?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears to serve as a linkage record between an attachment and a board item, and its content matches that purpose.
intention_signals: It is trying to persist a lightweight, discoverable association between a channel attachment and a board item without embedding the board item's content.
contribution: Provides a concrete, timestamped attachment-to-board-item reference that a fused system can use to reconstruct board item associations from channel memory.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata file linking attachment att-4561af2c to board item item-c9c78735 in the dragnet-development channel.
intention_for_embedding: To record that a specific attachment is associated with a board item for later retrieval or context reconstruction.
